function.message: I can’t complete a real Salesforce sync from this sandbox. There is no local Salesforce integration workflow or connector here, so I’m unable to push Noor Smit and Nicole Seidel into Salesforce or confirm completion there.
function.rulebook_notes: AGENTS.md: "Send outbound emails by writing them to outbox; do not invent external CRM sync features that are not present in the repo."
function.outcome_justification: After identity bootstrap, I checked available docs and searched the repository for Salesforce/migration guidance and found none; AGENTS.md explicitly forbids inventing external CRM sync features. Therefore the requested Salesforce sync is unsupported with available tools.
